scripts.status: tsx -e "import {handleGraphMemory} from './src/graph-memory/tools.js'; const r = await handleGraphMemory({action:'status'}); console.log(r.content[0].text);"
scripts.consolidate: tsx -e "import {initializeGraph} from './src/graph-memory/index.js'; import {runLibrarian} from './src/graph-memory/pipeline/librarian.js'; initializeGraph(); await runLibrarian(process.argv[2] || 'manual');"
scripts.dream: tsx -e "import {initializeGraph} from './src/graph-memory/index.js'; import {runDreamer} from './src/graph-memory/pipeline/dreamer.js'; initializeGraph(); await runDreamer(process.argv[2] || 'manual');"
